form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] employeeId[员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>period[周期]====== periodFrom[周期开始] periodTo[周期结束] totalHours[总工时] =========>approval[审批信息]====== status[状态] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] employeeId[员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>period[周期]====== periodFrom[周期开始] periodTo[周期结束] totalHours[总工时] =========>approval[审批信息]====== status[状态] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] employeeId[员工] orgId[业务组织] status[状态] businessDate[业务日期]
